title: Create Ultimate Pack - The Industrial Age
description: The ULTIMATE modpack for Create mod is here. Filled with many many mods. I mean MANY mods!
body:
## Project is now discontinued! ##
I present to you, my modpack, Create Ultimate Pack. It was a great journey to be here and release versions and updates for it for a ¾ of a year! I hope you enjoy the latest version of the modpack (2.1.1).

# ❗ Report Issues #
**Any issues with this project can be reported in our [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/5PCXmRYcJc).**

# ❗ About
> ❔ Create mod is one of the best mods ever made in Minecraft. But just Create mod is not going to cut it. So I made a modpack to make the experience better.
###
> ✔️ This modpack **is mostly compatible** with the worlds in other Create mod modpacks because of the mass amount of mods. Meaning **you should be able to continue playing if you have played another modpack before** (with some block losses) and you don't have to reset your world. I tested Create Haven Adventures (is on Curseforge) and it loads fine.
###
> 🧑‍💻 This modpack **is just in Modrinth and won't be ported to Curseforge**.
###

<details>
<summary>💻 Hardware Specifications Needed to Run This Modpack:</summary>

💻 This modpack needs **about 6GB of RAM** to run properly. This is a versatile and heavy modpack and needs a good hardware to run well, mid-range devices can run this on 60fps, but ~75 degrees celcius temperature on GPU is expected. (This amount of temperature is tested on my laptop: ASUS VivoBook X515EP-EJ743 with following specifications: Intel Core i7 1165G7 - Nvidia Geforce MX330 - 16GB RAM DDR4 - 1TB SSD - 1080p 60hz)

</details>


# 💡 Check Out My Other Modpacks #
> **Ultimately Optimized - Vanilla but Better!** : **Vanilla**, but with tons and tons of **client-side features, visual improvements and quality of life changes**.
>
>
> **[Check It Out Right Now](https://modrinth.com/modpack/minecraft-ultimately-optimized)**
>
>
> **Low on Water! The Ultimate Realism** : A **realistic** modpack which **relies on physics and realism**. Probably not more dragons, because it isn't RLCraft! **Currently in Alpha stage.**
>
> **[Check It Out Right Now](https://modrinth.com/modpack/low-on-water)**
>
>
# 📃 Things Included
> - [Create mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) and its addons
> - [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight) and its addons
> - [Framed Blocks](https://modrinth.com/mod/framedblocks)
> - Biome generation mods like: [Biomes O'Planty](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomes-o-plenty) - [Good Ending](https://modrinth.com/mod/good-ending)
> - Structure generation mods like: [MVS](https://modrinth.com/mod/moogs-voyager-structures) - [Dungeons And Taverns](https://modrinth.com/datapack/dungeons-and-taverns) - [Most of YUNG's Mods](https://modrinth.com/collection/HL3n3I0A/mods)
> - More mobs thanks to [Alex's Mobs](https://modrinth.com/mod/alexs-mobs)
> - Backpack Mods including: [Sophisticated Backpacks](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/sophisticated-backpacks) - [Traveler's Backpack](https://modrinth.com/mod/travelersbackpack)
> - Storage Mods like: [Applied Enegestics 2](https://modrinth.com/mod/ae2/) - [Storage Drawers](https://modrinth.com/mod/storagedrawers) - [Tom's Simple Storage](https://modrinth.com/mod/toms-storage) - [Sophisticated Storage](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/sophisticated-storage)
> - [Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap/) and [Xaero's World Map](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map/)
> - QoL mods like: [Quark](https://modrinth.com/mod/quark) - [Supplementaries](https://modrinth.com/mod/supplementaries) - [Construction Wand](https://modrinth.com/mod/construction-wand) - [Easy Emerald Tools and More](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/easy-emerald-tools) - [Twigs](https://modrinth.com/mod/twigs) - [Easy Anvils](https://modrinth.com/mod/easy-anvils) - [Easy Magic](https://modrinth.com/mod/easy-magic) - [Waystones](https://modrinth.com/mod/waystones)
> - Misc. mods like: [Falling Tree](https://modrinth.com/mod/fallingtree) - [Chipped](https://modrinth.com/mod/chipped)
> - And many, many, many optimization mods...

# 🎫 Licencing #
> This modpack is licensed under **Creative Commons Attribution Non Commercial No Derivatives 4.0 International**. A summary of it means that you, as a user of this project, can **redistributable my project as long as it isn't modified, it isn't for commercial use, and you credit me and my project**.
